{
  "claims": [
    "Assembly Bill 1861 helps defend California wine producers from Pierce’s disease and invasive species.",
    "The wine industry is integral to the economic success of the Central Coast and all of California.",
    "AB 1861 extends a crucial line of defense for California's wine industry against invasive diseases.",
    "California's wine regions benefit from collaboration among state, local, and federal governments and the industry in combating Pierce’s Disease and the Glassy Winged Sharpshooter.",
    "AB 1861 strengthens the Pierce’s Disease Control Program at the California Department of Food and Agriculture.",
